content:
Hello there! 👋 # My name is Ivan Hilmi Derian. I’m an undergraduate student at Brawijaya University studying Information System. I grew up in Sidoarjo, Indonesia, but right now i’m living in Malang, Indonesia. Coding is a passion of mine, one that i constantly try to improve at.
Skills # A list about some of my skills
Programming / Scripting Languages # Java • JavaScript • PHP • html • css
Frameworks # Laravel
Version control # Git • Github
Database # MySQL, DB2
UI Kit # Bootsrap
Avid cook from time to time. 🥘 Animal videos all day! 🐱
title: About Me
